name: claude-advisor
description: Safety-first independent Claude advisory and pull-request reviews for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Independent Claude advice and PR reviews.
interface.longDescription: Ask a locally authenticated Claude Code CLI for a bounded second opinion or evidence-oriented pull-request review, with no Claude tools, strict ceilings, and durable provenance receipts.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude for an independent opinion on this decision.
Ask Claude to adversarially review this pull request.
